raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative admission and foundational declaration of a problem, serving as the first step in a recovery program",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker(s) cannot control their drinking",
    "alcohol has rendered their lives unmanageable",
    "this admission is accurate and necessary for change"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; equates powerlessness with unmanageability as linked facets of the same condition",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the individual has a genuine alcohol-use disorder, the admission reduces denial without fostering fatalism, and it occurs within a supportive recovery framework",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is applied to non-addictive behavior, encourages total abdication of agency, or is presented as universally true rather than context-specific"
}
